items.title: oh-my-codex
items.description: OmX - Oh My codeX: Your codex is not alone. Add hooks, agent teams, HUDs, and so much more.
items.description_zh: OmX - 哦我的 codeX：你的法典并不孤单。添加挂钩、代理团队、HUD 等等。

items.title: onyx
items.description: Open Source AI Platform - AI Chat with advanced features that works with every LLM
items.description_zh: 开源 AI 平台 - AI Chat 具有适用于每个 LLM 的高级功能

items.title: timesfm
items.description: TimesFM (Time Series Foundation Model) is a pretrained time-series foundation model developed by Google Research for time-series forecasting.
items.description_zh: TimesFM（时间序列基础模型）是 Google Research 开发的用于时间序列预测的预训练时间序列基础模型。

items.title: openscreen
items.description: Create stunning demos for free. Open-source, no subscriptions, no watermarks, and free for commercial use. An alternative to Screen Studio.
items.description_zh: 免费创建令人惊叹的演示。开源、无订阅、无水印、免费用于商业用途。 Screen Studio 的替代品。

items.title: fff.nvim
items.description: The fastest and the most accurate file search toolkit for AI agents, Neovim, Rust, C, and NodeJS
items.description_zh: 适用于 AI 代理、Neovim、Rust、C 和 NodeJS 的最快、最准确的文件搜索工具包

items.title: prompts.chat
items.description: f.k.a. Awesome ChatGPT Prompts. Share, discover, and collect prompts from the community. Free and open source — self-host for your organization with complete privacy.
items.description_zh: F.K.A.很棒的 ChatGPT 提示。分享、发现并收集社区中的提示。免费和开源——为您的组织自行托管，并具有完全的隐私。

items.title: sherlock
items.description: Hunt down social media accounts by username across social networks
items.description_zh: 通过社交网络上的用户名查找社交媒体帐户
